description_long: This is an L-shaped wooden desk with a rich brown finish, featuring a spacious work surface and a sturdy, modern design. On one side, there are three pull-out drawers with dark handles, providing ample storage for office supplies or documents. The opposite side includes a cabinet with a door and a vertical handle, suitable for storing larger items or a computer tower. The desk's construction appears robust, with thick panels and a seamless wood grain texture throughout. The surface is flat and expansive, ideal for placing monitors, books, or other work materials. The overall aesthetic is functional yet stylish, making it suitable for professional or home office environments.
description: A large L-shaped wooden desk with three drawers and a cabinet, featuring a rich brown finish and modern, sturdy design.
description_view_0: The desk is seen from the side, highlighting the thick wooden panels and the open leg space beneath the main work surface.
description_view_1: This top-down view reveals the full L-shape, the arrangement of the drawers on the left, and the cabinet door on the right.
description_view_2: From this angle, the three drawers with dark handles are clearly visible, as well as the partially open cabinet door.
description_view_3: The back of the desk is shown, displaying the continuous wood grain and the solid construction of the rear panels.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side features three drawers on the left and a cabinet door on the right, with the open leg space intended for seating in the center of the L-shape.
